## Summary

Describe what this PR changes and why.

## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] Docs
- [ ] Test
- [ ] CI/CD

## Validation

- [ ] Backend tests pass locally (`pytest`)
- [ ] Frontend build passes (`npm run build`)
- [ ] No secrets or private data introduced

## Documentation

- [ ] README updated (if needed)
- [ ] `docs/changelog.md` updated (if behavior changed)
- [ ] `docs/ROADMAP.md` / `docs/todo.md` updated (if planning changed)

## Screenshots / Logs

Add screenshots or logs if relevant.
